---
name: 📊 Testing Report
about: Share your testing results with different models or codebases
title: '[TESTING] '
labels: testing
assignees: ''

---

**Testing Context**
- Model used: [e.g. Qwen3.5-4B, Qwen3.5-9B, Llama-3-70B]
- Codebase size: [e.g. 50 files, 500+ files]
- Task type: [e.g. refactoring, feature addition, test generation]
- GPU: [e.g. RTX 3060 12GB, RTX 4090, CPU only]

**What Worked Well**
Describe what worked well during your testing.

**What Didn't Work**
Describe any issues, failures, or unexpected behavior.

**Performance Metrics** (if applicable)
- Token speed: [e.g. 45 tok/s]
- Task completion time: [e.g. 5 minutes]
- Success rate: [e.g. 8/10 tasks completed]
- Entropy changes: [e.g. H: 0.45 → 0.38]

**Model Comparison** (if tested multiple models)
Compare performance between different model sizes.

**Recommendations**
Any suggestions for improvements or configurations that worked well.

**Additional Context**
Add any other observations, logs, or screenshots.
